name: parentpick-guard
description: Codex plugin for organizing newborn baby-product trust and safety-risk evidence into MECE reports.

interface.shortDescription: Turn baby-product safety notes into structured parent reports.
interface.longDescription: ParentPick Guard helps newborn parents and Codex agents organize public-source baby-product trust signals, risk signals, source conflicts, and next actions into a structured MECE report without making medical diagnoses or unsupported product-danger claims.
defaultPrompt: Use ParentPick Guard to organize this baby-product case.
Create a MECE trust and risk report from these sources.
Generate the sample ParentPick Guard HTML report.
